issues.title: Quarterly business review deck
issues.description:
QBR with exec team next Wednesday. Need slides covering:

* Revenue vs target
* Customer growth metrics
* Top deals closed
* Churn analysis

Deadline: Monday EOD so leadership can review.

**Assigned to:** Eleanor Edwards, Benjamin Blackwood

issues.title: Set up staging environment
issues.description:
We've been deploying straight to prod which is risky. Need a proper staging setup.

AWS estimate: \~$400/month for staging infra. Submitted budget request to finance.

Once approved, James can provision in about 2 days.

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10110W)

issues.title: Delivery confirmation: Gamma Technologies
issues.description:
Order ORD-100035N shows delivered but customer hasn't confirmed receipt.

Might just be busy. Send a quick email checking if everything arrived OK. If no response in 3 days, call them.

Template at templates.internal/delivery-followup.html

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10124K)

issues.title: Broken link on pricing page
issues.description:
Customer reported that "Contact Sales" button leads to 404. Probably from the last deploy.

Quick fix - just need to update the href in the React component. File is probably src/pages/Pricing.tsx.

Low priority but looks unprofessional.

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10110W)

issues.title: Competitive analysis: new market entrant
issues.description:
Heard that NovaTech Solutions launched a competing product. Pricing seems aggressive.

Need someone to:

* Sign up for their trial
* Document features vs ours
* Check their reviews on G2 and Capterra

Summary deck due for strategy meeting on the 20th.

**Assigned to:** Product Team

issues.title: NPS survey follow-up: Alpha Dynamics Corp
issues.description:
They gave us a 6 (passive) on the last NPS survey. Left comment about slow response times.

Worth a personal call to understand better. If we can move them to promoter, they'd be good reference account.

Survey data at surveys.internal/nps/2024-q3/

**Assigned to:** Gregory Chen

issues.title: Code review backlog
issues.description:
12 PRs waiting for review, some over a week old. Slowing down the team.

Proposal: rotate review duty weekly. This week: James Chen (EMP-10110W). Next week: Ulrich Olsen.

Set up GitHub action to ping on Slack if PR is open >48 hours.

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10110W), Ulrich Olsen

issues.title: Sales playbook for enterprise deals
issues.description:
Need documented process for deals over $50K. Currently everyone does their own thing.

Benjamin Blackwood closed our biggest deal last quarter - have them write up their approach. Include objection handling, pricing flexibility, legal approval workflow.

Target: 10-page PDF at sales.internal/playbooks/enterprise.pdf

**Assigned to:** Benjamin Blackwood

issues.title: Photo update: Surface Pro 9
issues.description:
Product photos are outdated - using stock imagery. Need fresh shots for the website refresh.

Photography vendor (Aperture Studios, contact: [mike@aperturestudios.com](mailto:mike@aperturestudios.com)) quoted $200 per product. Maybe batch this with other items needing updates.

Current images at cdn.internal/products/SKU-100011/

**Assigned to:** Marketing Team

issues.title: Book room for Sprint Retrospective
issues.description:
Meeting on 2024-11-30 needs a conference room. Preferably one with video setup since Daniel mentioned some folks dialing in.

Check availability at rooms.internal/booking. Backup option: use Zoom if no rooms free.

**Assigned to:** Office Admin

issues.title: Q4 budget variance report
issues.description:
We're 8% over on marketing spend. Need to explain this to leadership.

The overage is mostly from the trade show in October - wasn't in original budget but generated good leads. Pull ROI data from HubSpot to justify.

Report template at finance.internal/templates/variance-q4.xlsx.

**Assigned to:** Eleanor Edwards

issues.title: Update employee handbook for remote work
issues.description:
Current policy is outdated - written pre-COVID. Need to formalize the hybrid arrangement.

Legal reviewed and approved the draft. See comments in [docs.google.com/handbook-v3-draft](http://docs.google.com/handbook-v3-draft).

Target rollout: January 1st. Announce in December all-hands.

**Assigned to:** Daniel Dimitrov

issues.title: Customer portal login issues
issues.description:
Got 4 tickets this week about customers unable to reset passwords. The reset email goes to spam for Gmail users.

Need to:

* Check SPF/DKIM records at [cloudflare.com](http://cloudflare.com) dashboard
* Maybe switch to SendGrid for transactional emails
* Add "check spam folder" note to the login page for now

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10110W), Georgia Gonzalez

issues.title: Backup supplier needed for Germany
issues.description:
We're too dependent on EuroDistributors GmbH for that market. If they have supply issues, we're stuck.

Find 2-3 alternatives on [thomasnet.com](http://thomasnet.com) or [alibaba.com](http://alibaba.com). Get quotes and samples before December.

Quality is key - don't want to compromise on that.

**Assigned to:** Felix Fischer

issues.title: Annual review: InnovateCo Industries
issues.description:
Account is up for renewal next month. Currently on standard terms.

Pull their order history and see if volume justifies better pricing. Also check if they've had any support tickets - don't want surprises in the renewal call.

Template for renewal proposals is at templates.internal/renewals/enterprise.docx.

**Assigned to:** Florence Garcia

issues.title: Win-back: Aurora Industries cancelled
issues.description:
Order ORD-100122W was cancelled. Don't know why yet.

Worth a call to understand - if it's pricing, we have room to negotiate. If it's delivery time, we can offer expedited.

Check CRM notes first to see if there's history. Good accounts are worth fighting for.

**Assigned to:** Benjamin Blackwood

issues.title: Win-back: Neptune Trading Co cancelled
issues.description:
Order ORD-100113N was cancelled. Don't know why yet.

Worth a call to understand - if it's pricing, we have room to negotiate. If it's delivery time, we can offer expedited.

Check CRM notes first to see if there's history. Good accounts are worth fighting for.

**Assigned to:** Victor Garcia

issues.title: Prep deck for Weekly Team Standup

Pull numbers from the dashboard at analytics.internal/q4-summary. Include the chart showing month-over-month growth.

Benjamin Blackwood will present but needs the deck by day before.

**Assigned to:** Eleanor Edwards

issues.title: Territory conflict in APAC region
issues.description:
Benjamin Blackwood and James Chen (EMP-10124K) are both working the same accounts in Singapore.

Had a call with both of them - agreeing to split by industry vertical instead of geography. Tech companies go to Benjamin, manufacturing to James.

Drawing up new territory map in Salesforce. Target completion: Friday.

**Assigned to:** Benjamin Blackwood, James Chen (EMP-10124K)

issues.title: Tracking issue: Quantum Labs Inc can't see updates
issues.description:
Order ORD-100024C shipped on 2024-11-12 but tracking hasn't updated since leaving our warehouse.

FedEx says it's a scan issue - package is actually in transit. I've escalated to their support (ticket #FDX-445892).

Need to call customer and explain, maybe offer free shipping on next order as goodwill.

**Assigned to:** Georgia Gonzalez

issues.title: Custom packaging for NextGen Digital
issues.description:
Order ORD-100020Y needs special handling - they requested eco-friendly packaging for a sustainability campaign.

We don't normally stock biodegradable packing peanuts but found a supplier on Alibaba. Lead time is 3 days.

Worth adding to our standard options? Getting quotes for bulk purchase.

**Assigned to:** Lydia Morrison, James Chen (EMP-10110W)

issues.title: Urgent restock: iPhone 15 Pro
issues.description:
We've had 3 customers ask about SKU-100001 this week and it's showing out of stock.

Called TechSource Global - they can ship 50 units by Friday if we order today. Cost is $2 higher per unit due to rush shipping but worth it.

PO draft saved at [drive.google.com/purchasing/po-drafts/2024-nov](http://drive.google.com/purchasing/po-drafts/2024-nov).

**Assigned to:** Felix Fischer

issues.title: Waiting on payment: DataFlow Systems
issues.description:

Stripe shows the charge as "pending verification" - might be a fraud flag. Called the customer and they said the payment should have gone through.

Next steps:

* Check with Stripe support (case #STR-2024-8834)
* If not resolved by EOD, offer bank transfer as alternative
* Keep customer updated

**Assigned to:** Rachel Yang

issues.title: Fixed the checkout timeout bug
issues.description:
The 504 errors on checkout were caused by the payment gateway taking too long. Added a retry mechanism with exponential backoff.

Deployed to prod yesterday, monitoring looks clean. Error rate down from 2.3% to 0.1%.

Docs updated at docs.internal/checkout-flow#retry-logic.

**Assigned to:** James Chen (EMP-10110W)

issues.title: Updated billing address for Acme Corporation
issues.description:
They moved offices last month. New address is in the system.

Also updated their primary contact to Harrison Larsson since Janet left.

Let Benjamin Blackwood know so they can send a housewarming gift.

**Assigned to:** Georgia Gonzalez

issues.title: Completed sales training for Q4
issues.description:
All sales reps completed the new CRM training module on [learn.salesforce.com/advanced-pipeline](http://learn.salesforce.com/advanced-pipeline).

Benjamin Blackwood scored highest (94%) - maybe have them run a refresher for the team next month.

Training certificates uploaded to HR portal.

**Assigned to:** Daniel Dimitrov

issues.title: Negotiated better terms with TechSource Global
issues.description:
Extended payment terms from Net 30 to Net 45. They agreed because of our order volume.

Should save us about $12K in cash flow improvements this quarter. Updated the supplier record in the system.

Might want to try the same approach with other suppliers rated above 4.0.

**Assigned to:** Felix Fischer

Customer confirmed receipt via email. Left a positive review on Trustpilot - might be worth featuring on our testimonials page.
